payload.title: Wire hosted multi-tenant auth into the live hub
payload.description: The auth_hosted modules (OIDC, JWT/refresh sessions, hashed per-user API keys, project membership/roles, on-upload authz) are built and unit-tested under SCP-129..134, but grep shows they are NOT imported in src/server.js. The deployed Fly hub (scope-hub.fly.dev) still runs the interim single shared bearer token with loopback bypass — unsafe for a multi-tenant public service. This epic integrates the existing hosted-auth stack into the live cloud request path, provisions Fly Postgres + GitHub OIDC, and retires the shared token. LAN/mTLS local path stays untouched (ADR 0003 §5).
